creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Outdated

Update is blocked by bug 256342 and USES=mono using lang/mono6.8 or https://wiki.freebsd.org/.NET

For example, after https://github.com/openra/openra/commit/19b02875c7da the build fails with:

CSC : error CS1617: Invalid option '7.3' for /langversion. Use '/langversion:?' to list supported values. [.../OpenRA-release-20210321/OpenRA.Game/OpenRA.Game.csproj]

> Error: Files or directories left over: @dir share/mime/x-scheme-handler

See bug 272310
